name: deep pit
items_start: Rope leading out of the pit
hints: You are at the bottom of the deep pit with a rope leading back up. Go SOUTH to explore further.
The rope is your lifeline back up. Go SOUTH to find the cyclops and cave entrance.
SOUTH leads to the cyclops area. The rope lets you climb back out to the grotto above.
notes: Bottom of the deep pit with rope leading up to the grotto (room 30). South leads to the cyclops area (room 34). Bring the sword to deal with the cyclops.
